stories.title: U.S., Iran agree to 2-week ceasefire. And, Trump-backed Clay Fuller wins House race
stories.description: The U.S. reached a last-minute ceasefire with Iran just before Trump's deadline for the country to meet his demands. And, Trump-backed Clay Fuller wins the U.S. House race in Georgia.

stories.title: How Trump's threats to Iran have affected the global economy
stories.description: NPR's Leila Fadel speaks with Tomas {TAHM-us} Philipson, a former senior economic adviser in President Trump's first term, about the impact of the president's wartime threats on the global economy.

stories.title: The U.S. and Iran agree to a 2-week ceasefire
stories.description: President Trump said the U.S. and Israel would suspend bombing Iran for two weeks if Iran follows through on its commitment to reopen the Strait of Hormuz for safe passage.

stories.title: Trump has backed down from his threat to wipe out Iran's civilization
stories.description: President Trump has backed down from his threat to wipe out Iran's civilization and bomb its power plants by Tuesday night. Online, he said he agreed to suspend the bombing of Iran for two weeks.

stories.title: Congressional Democrats raise alarm over Trump's comments on Iran
stories.description: Dozens of congressional Democrats raised alarm Tuesday over President Trump's rhetoric about Iran. Most Republican lawmakers have been silent.

stories.title: Trump's deadline for an Iran deal looms. And, Artemis II crew begins the journey home
stories.description: In a press conference last night, Trump reiterated threats against Iran if the country doesn't accept a deal by 8:00 p.m. ET tonight. And, the Artemis II crew are on their way back to Earth.

stories.title: U.S. and Iran agree to 2-week ceasefire, suspending Trump's threat to annihilate Iran
stories.description: After Iran ceded to President Trump's demand to reopen the Strait of Hormuz, Trump backed down from his threat of wide-scale destruction of Iran's civilian and military infrastructure.

stories.title: Beer cans, helium balloons and mortgages: An unexpected mix of things affected by war
stories.description: It's not just oil and gas that are affected by the Iran war. All sorts of shortages and price spikes are starting to pop up that stand to affect people's daily lives.

stories.title: Iran ceasefire deal gives Trump a way out of war - but at a high cost
stories.description: The path to the two-week ceasefire with Iran may have fundamentally altered the way the rest of the world views the US.

stories.title: Israel carries out large wave of air strikes across Lebanon
stories.description: Attacks hit the southern suburbs of Beirut, southern Lebanon and the eastern Bekaa Valley hours after a US-Iran ceasefire was announced.

stories.title: What we know about the two-week ceasefire between the US and Iran
stories.description: The provisional truce comes more than a month after the US and Israel launched coordinated attacks on Iran.

stories.title: How Pakistan helped secure a fragile ceasefire between the US and Iran
stories.description: Pakistan has a historic relationship with Iran, but an agreement was far from certain, writes the BBC’s Caroline Davies

stories.title: Oil prices plunge and shares jump on US-Iran ceasefire plan
stories.description: Crude prices tumbled by as much as 15% on the conditional pause but remain far higher than before the war.

stories.title: French couple leave Iran after more than three years in jail
stories.description: Cecile Kohler and Jacques Paris are on their way home after being allowed to leave the country, the French president says.

stories.title: Trump condemned over threat that Iran's 'civilisation will die'
stories.description: The UN's chief says he is "deeply troubled" by such statements, as the US president ramps up pressure on Iran to agree a deal to end the war.

stories.title: Trump issues expletive-laden threat to Iran over Hormuz Strait blockage
stories.description: The US president says he will destroy Iranian power plants and bridges if the vital waterway is not reopened.

stories.title: How rescue of US airman in remote part of Iran unfolded
stories.description: The operation to extract him from the ground in hostile territory was hugely complex and involved multiple US government agencies.

stories.title: Trump declares victory after rescue but threats to US operation in Iran still loom
stories.description: The rescue could impact how Trump views a ground operation to take Kharg Island or to seize enriched uranium sites.

stories.title: US says it has arrested relatives of late Iranian ​general Qasem ​Soleimani
stories.description: The niece and grand-niece of Qasem Soleimani are in the custody of US Immigration and Customs Enforcement, officials said.

stories.title: French-owned ship passes through Strait of Hormuz
stories.description: It appears to be the first ship owned by a major European firm to go through the strait since the conflict began.

stories.title: Little sign of breakthrough as Trump's Iran deadline nears
stories.description: The US president is in a delicate political position as the final hours to Tuesday's deadline for Iran to open the Strait of Hormuz tick down.

stories.title: 'We're sinking deeper': Iranians brace for infrastructure strikes as Trump deadline nears
stories.description: Ordinary Iranians respond to the US president's threat to destroy Iran's power plants and bridges unless it opens the Strait of Hormuz.

stories.title: Experts dispute US account of deadly Iran sports hall strike in Lamerd
stories.description: Six weapons experts have contested the US claim that video evidence suggests an Iranian missile could have hit the hall.

stories.title: Talks to be held in Pakistan after US, Israel agree to ceasefire with Iran
stories.description: ⁠Iranian ​President ​Masoud Pezeshkian has confirmed that ​Iran ‌will ⁠participate ‌in negotiations with the ⁠U.S. in Islamabad ​that seek ‌to resolve their conflict, ‌a ​statement from Pakistani Prime Minister Shehbaz ​Sharif's ​office said ​on ​Wednesday, following the announce...

stories.title: Ex-Iran detainees back in France: 'The culmination of years of hard work'
stories.description: President Emmanuel Macron on Wednesday welcomed two French nationals who returned to Paris after spending almost four years detained in Iran on espionage charges, with the French leader hailing "the end of a terrible ordeal". The release of Cecile Kohler, 41, and Jacques Paris, 7...

stories.title: No link between release of French pair held in Iran and Mideast war, France says
stories.description: Two French nationals arrived home on Wednesday after Iran allowed them to leave the country following three and a half years in detention, a surprise move that came as Paris sought to distance itself from the war in the region. France 24's Kethevane Gorjestani takes a closer look...

stories.title: Macron greets French pair back in Paris after 'terrible ordeal' in Iran
stories.description: President Emmanuel Macron on Wednesday welcomed two French nationals who returned to Paris after spending almost four years detained in Iran on espionage charges, with the French leader hailing "the end of a terrible ordeal". Cecile Kohler, 41, and Jacques Paris, 72, arrived on a...

stories.title: REPLAY: 'A message of hope' - French pair held in Iran speak to media after release
stories.description: Two French nationals who returned to Paris after spending almost four years detained in Iran on espionage charges were welcomed by President Emmanuel Macron at the Elysee Palace on Wednesday. Cecile Kohler, 41, and Jacques Paris, 72, thanked their families, friends and the French...

stories.title: Israel strikes Lebanon as says Iran truce does not apply
stories.description: An Israeli strike destroyed a building in the southern Lebanese city of Tyre on Wednesday as Israel kept up its offensive against what it says are Hezbollah targets in the country, insisting a truce agreed between itself and the United Sates with Iran does not apply to the countr...

stories.title: Israel says Iran ceasefire does not include Lebanon
stories.description: Israel's military said Wednesday its forces would continue their campaign against Hezbollah fighters, claiming the ceasefire with Iran does not apply to Lebanon. France 24's Noga Tarnopolsky has the latest.

stories.title: Pro-regime Iranians celebrate ceasefire
stories.description: Supporters of Iran's Supreme Leader have been taking to the streets in Tehran to celebrate following the two week ceasefire announcement in the war with the US and Israel. US President Donald Trump has repeatedly claimed "regime change" has already happened in the country despite...

stories.title: Iran ceasefire: What happens next?
stories.description: The United States and Iran have agreed to a two-week ceasefire, reaching a deal less than two hours before President Donald Trump's deadline for Tehran to reopen the Strait of ​Hormuz or face the wiping out of "a whole civilization". Negotiations are now set to take place over a ...

stories.title: Both sides claim victory after US, Iran agree to a two-week ceasefire
stories.description: The United States and Iran agreed to a two-week ceasefire barely an hour before US President Donald Trump's Wednesday deadline to obliterate the country, triggering global relief. Following the announcement, both Tehran and Washington claimed to have won the more than month-long ...

stories.title: Oil prices fall after ceasefire deal as questions over Hormuz Strait linger
stories.description: A two-week ceasefire agreement between the United States and Iran on Wednesday led to a steep drop in oil prices and a rebound in Asian and European equities. In this edition, we see what the various stakeholders are saying the deal means for the future of the Hormuz Strait throu...

stories.title: US-Iran ceasefire: 'Still unclear what is to be negotiated'
stories.description: Donald Trump has added more confusion to the terms of the ceasefire agreed with Iran by telling AFP that the US had a “15-point” proposal for talks set to take place in the next two weeks, having earlier said that Iran had presented a 10-point plan, reports France 24’s correspond...

stories.title: Declarations of victory in Iran after ceasefire agreed with US
stories.description: An agreement for a two-week ceasefire with the US and Israel is being hailed as a victory in Iran, reports France 24's correspondent Reza Sayah, with state media claiming the deal is "yet another retreat" by US president Donald Trump.

stories.title: Gulf countries report attacks despite Iran ceasefire
stories.description: A number of Gulf states have reported being targeted by Iranian strikes despite the ceasefire agreed between Iran, the US and Israel. Qatar and the United Arab Emirates said missiles heading for the country were intercepted, sirens were heard sounding in Saudi Arabia and two peop...

stories.title: 'Clearly insane', 'not well', 'stunning': Papers discuss Trump's rhetoric
stories.description: PRESS REVIEW - Wednesday, April 8: Papers discuss US President Donald Trump's mental health after his "stunning" threat to wipe out Iran. While attention is on the Middle East, the Epstein investigation continues: we take a look at the latest. Finally, an iconic duo graces the co...

stories.title: UAE, Kuwait, Bahrain report attacks despite Iran-US ceasefire
stories.description: Several strikes reported across the Gulf region hours after the US and Iran announce a ceasefire for two weeks.

stories.title: Lebanon excluded from ceasefire as Israeli strikes continue
stories.description: Israel has backed a ceasefire between the US and Iran but made clear it does not extend to Lebanon.

stories.title: US-Iran ceasefire deal: What are the terms, and what’s next?
stories.description: Trump cites Iran's 10-point plan as a basis for negotiation, signalling potential progress towards long-term peace.

stories.title: GCC, other Middle East nations react to Iran-US ceasefire announcement
stories.description: Countries in the region welcome the temporary truce and urge negotiations for the war's permanent end.

stories.title: Tehran celebrates as Iran, US agree to two-week ceasefire
stories.description: Iran hails the pause in hostilities as a 'victory', crediting national unity and patience for the agreement.

stories.title: US-Israeli war on Iran: What is happening on day 40?
stories.description: The US and Iran agree to a two-week truce, just an hour before Trump’s deadline to escalate the conflict expired.

stories.title: Iran war live: Trump, Tehran declare ceasefire, but some attacks continue
stories.description: In advance of upcoming talks in Islamabad, the US and Iran claim victory, as Trump lays down his terms.

stories.title: In Strait of Hormuz, Iran and China take aim at US dollar hegemony
stories.description: Tehran and Beijing both stand to gain from boosting status of the Chinese yuan.

stories.title: US ceasefire allows negotiations on Iran’s ‘workable’ 10-point plan
stories.description: Donald Trump’s announcement of a two-week ceasefire paves the way for negotiations on Iran's 10-point plan.

stories.title: US politicians react to Trump’s Iran ceasefire with caution, relief
stories.description: Republican hawks voice scepticism about talks with Tehran as Democrats welcome the truce and call for accountability.

stories.title: Iranians commemorate victims of Minab school strike
stories.description: Iranians have commemorated the victims of the US strike on a girls school in Minab, that killed 168 people.

stories.title: World welcomes US-Iran ceasefire, urges lasting peace in the Middle East
stories.description: Countries urge full commitment to two-week ceasefire, praise Pakistan for role in facilitating truce.

stories.title: Netanyahu says US-Iran ceasefire ‘does not include Lebanon’
stories.description: Israeli prime minister welcomes US decision to suspend attacks on Iran, but says the truce does not apply to Lebanon.

stories.title: Iraqis celebrates US-Iran ceasefire as two-week halt in war begins
stories.description: Celebrations have erupted in Iraq following the announcement of a two-week ceasefire between Iran and the US.

stories.title: EU gas prices may fall to $430-460 on successful US-Iran talks — expert
stories.description: Gas prices in Europe dropped by 18% at the opening of trading on Wednesday to $518 per 1,000 cubic meters

stories.title: Iran will "rise again" if ceasefire is disrupted — Supreme Leader's representative
stories.description: Abdul Majid Hakeem Ilahi reiterated Tehran’s stance, noting that Iran "did not seek this war and considers it to be imposed upon it"

stories.title: Kuwait, UAE come under attack following strikes on Iranian oil refinery — TV
stories.description: Earlier, the broadcaster accused the US and Israel of violating a ceasefire agreement over an attack on an oil refinery on Lawan Island

stories.title: War between US, Iran likely over — cooperation agency head
stories.description: Earlier, Pakistani Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif announced that Iran and the United States had agreed to a ceasefire that would be effective immediately and would be observed in Lebanon and elsewhere

stories.title: Moscow spoke about need for diplomatic course since start of war in Iran — Kremlin
stories.description: Dmitry Peskov noted that from the very beginning Moscow talked about the need to bring this escalation to a peaceful path as soon as possible

stories.title: First ships sail through Hormuz after announced ceasefire in region
stories.description: MarineTraffic web service reported said that several hundred ships are still present in the Persian Gulf now, including 426 tankers

stories.title: White House to lower request for funding operation in Iran to $80-100 bln — newspaper
stories.description: According to The Washington Post, it is unclear when the administration will send the request

stories.title: Ceasefire, opening of Strait of Hormuz temporary steps — Russian expert
stories.description: Pakistani Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif invited Iranian and US delegations to talks in Islamabad on April 10 to "reach a final agreement to resolve all disputes"
